panelsJSON.title: SaaS Security logs by Application Type

params.markdown:
**Zscaler ZIA**

This dashboard provides an overview of SaaS security events. It features bar charts for application types and names, as well as pie charts for severity. Additionally, it includes a line chart for tracking SaaS security events over time, along with tables for the top 10 rule names and threat indicator names.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/zscaler_zia/overview)
